title: collomia heterophylla
intro: Collomia heterophylla, also known as the variable-leaved collomia, is a flowering plant native to the northwestern United States and Canada, characterized by its showy pink or purple flowers and variable leaf shapes. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Collomia heterophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Collomia heterophylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
